description: A checklist graphic (portrait or square, PNG) from the U.S. Department of Labor on a dark navy-blue gradient background with a faint embossed DOL seal watermark behind the heading. At the top, centered, is the white DOL seal logo above the white text 'U.S. Department of Labor' with the italic subhead 'Self-Audit Initiative:'. Below is a four-item checklist, each line preceded by a checkmark inside a square box, in light blue and white small-caps serif text: 'IDENTIFIES & FIXES POTENTIAL VIOLATIONS', 'REDUCES LIKELIHOOD OF INVESTIGATION', 'DEMONSTRATES GOOD-FAITH COMMITMENT TO THE LAW', and 'ENSURES WORKER SAFETY & SECURITY'. A small white footer reads 'VISIT DOL.GOV/SELFAUDIT'.
notable_text: U.S. Department of Labor - Self-Audit Initiative: IDENTIFIES & FIXES POTENTIAL VIOLATIONS; REDUCES LIKELIHOOD OF INVESTIGATION; DEMONSTRATES GOOD-FAITH COMMITMENT TO THE LAW; ENSURES WORKER SAFETY & SECURITY; VISIT DOL.GOV/SELFAUDIT
